ns0:entry.ns0:title: Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI
Language: javascript
Uncensored, open-source alternative to Higgsfield AI, Freepik, Krea, Openart AI — Free, unrestricted AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-plugins
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-plugins
Language: javascript
A curated list of Plugins that let you extend Claude Code with custom commands, agents, hooks, and MCP servers through the plugin system.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DavidHDev/react-bits
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DavidHDev/react-bits
Language: javascript
An open source collection of animated, interactive & fully customizable React components for building memorable websites.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: EvoMap/evolver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EvoMap/evolver
Language: javascript
The GEP-Powered Self-Evolution Engine for AI Agents. Genome Evolution Protocol. | evomap.ai

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aandrew-me/ytDownloader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aandrew-me/ytDownloader
Language: javascript
Desktop App for downloading Videos and Audios from hundreds of sites

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coreyhaines31/marketingskills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coreyhaines31/marketingskills
Language: javascript
Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cv-cat/Spider_XHS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cv-cat/Spider_XHS
Language: javascript
小红书爬虫数据采集，小红书全域运营解决方案

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebook/hermes
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebook/hermes
Language: javascript
A JavaScript engine optimized for running React Native.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: foxhui/WebAI2API
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/foxhui/WebAI2API
Language: javascript
WebAI2API: 基于 Camoufox 的网页 AI 转 API 工具，支持 LMArena/Gemini等，多窗口并发与账号隔离。 | Web AI to OpenAI API via Camoufox. Supports LMArena/Gemini and more, multi-window concurrency & account isolation.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jo-inc/camofox-browser
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jo-inc/camofox-browser
Language: javascript
Headless browser automation server for AI agents to visit sites that are usually blocked

ns0:entry.ns0:title: koodo-reader/koodo-reader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/koodo-reader/koodo-reader
Language: javascript
A modern ebook manager and reader with sync and backup capacities for Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS and Web

ns0:entry.ns0:title: maboloshi/github-chinese
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/maboloshi/github-chinese
Language: javascript
GitHub 汉化插件，GitHub 中文化界面。 (GitHub Translation To Chinese)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: marktext/marktext
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/marktext/marktext
Language: javascript
📝A simple and elegant markdown editor, available for Linux, macOS and Windows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/Web-Dev-For-Beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/Web-Dev-For-Beginners
Language: javascript
24 Lessons, 12 Weeks, Get Started as a Web Developer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/power-platform-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/power-platform-skills
Language: javascript
A plugin marketplace for Claude Code/GitHub Copilot that provides Power Platform development plugins, including reusable skills, agents, and commands for building and deploying solutions.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: songquanpeng/one-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/songquanpeng/one-api
Language: javascript
LLM API 管理 & 分发系统，支持 OpenAI、Azure、Anthropic Claude、Google Gemini、DeepSeek、字节豆包、ChatGLM、文心一言、讯飞星火、通义千问、360 智脑、腾讯混元等主流模型，统一 API 适配，可用于 key 管理与二次分发。单可执行文件，提供 Docker 镜像，一键部署，开箱即用。LLM API management & key redistribution system, unifying multiple providers under a single API. Single binary, Docker-ready, with an English UI.
